import React from 'react'; import { useLocation, Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const Success = () => { const location = useLocation(); const orderData = location.state || {}; return (
🎉

Payment Successful!

Your advertising campaign is now active! Customers can see your logo and click through to your deals.

Order Confirmation

Order ID: {orderData.orderId || 'CLK-' + Date.now()}
Business: {orderData.businessName}
Advertising Square: #{orderData.squareNumber} (Page {orderData.pageNumber})
Campaign Duration: {orderData.duration} days
Total Paid: £{orderData.duration}.00
Start Date: {new Date().toLocaleDateString()}
End Date: {new Date(Date.now() + orderData.duration * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toLocaleDateString()}

What Happens Next?

  • ✅ Your logo is now live on the advertising grid
  • ✅ Customers can click your logo to visit your deals page
  • ✅ Your position will shuffle every 2 hours for fair exposure
  • ✅ You'll receive an email confirmation shortly
← Back to Homepage View Your Ad →

Need help? Contact us at support@clickalinks.com

); }; export default Success;
